title: cdp probe port-9 guard: discard low-port values to prevent HttpRequestException
desc: CDP probe now skips ports below 1024 (discard range) preventing 127.0.0.1:9 HttpRequestException that blocked suggest/eye/tick.
steps: commit 4f3606de fix(cdp-probe): guard low-port values. Port guard checks port < 1024 before ConnectAsync. eye and suggest commands no longer hang on low-port CDP probes.
Guard: port < 1024 skipped before ConnectAsync. Previously port=9 (discard) would make 329s hanging HttpRequestException.
suggest command port 9 error: commit 4884d0bc queued; fixed at 4f3606de. Now eye, suggest, tick all bypass low ports.
author: claude
